title: oberonia meegaskumburae
intro: Oberonia meegaskumburae is a rare orchid species, specifically a terrestrial orchid native to Sri Lanka. It is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Oberonia meegaskumburae are said to include reducing fever and alleviating various other health issues. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made from its roots and leaves, which are used in local remedies.
